entries.tipText: There's a water bottle near the fire. Press F to pick it up.
Stand in the water and hold right-click to fill your bottle.
Hold left-click to drink from the bottle.
Pick up the fishing rod, then cast at the bank.
Reel in a fish when the bobber wiggles.
Cook your fish at a fire, then eat it.
Open the build menu and place a Cabin to make a shelter.
